reviews.review_description: This game is absolutely crazy in the perfect way. The office is cramped, the environments are bleak and empty, the hallways and rooms are small or big, and the atmosphere is SO good. I’ve never played a Vr horror game that has made me scream like this game has. In my opinion, this game is comparable to games like Polardread or Grizzly’s. I beg of you monospark, DO NOT ABANDON THIS GAME OR AWKWARD MONKEY GAME.
Probably the best FNAF fan game on vr
